{{Quote|You missed the fight…The battle was glorious…It was an honor to… fall in such a splendid battle…|Unidentified Sith Lord to Darth Bane|<ref name="JVS2">[[Jedi vs. Sith 2|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 2]]</ref>}}
This '''battle''' was one of the final battles of the [[New Sith Wars]].

A great victory of the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]], the day before the battle, [[Kiel Charny]] and his men destroyed the gun turrets guarding the Sith encampment and charged the next morning.

The ranks of Kaan's army were broken, and the vassals of the Sith died by the thousands. [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], poisoned by his rival [[Skere Kaan]], did not participate, but came across the dead and a [[Unidentified Sith Lord (Darth Bane's first Ruusan victim)|Sith Lord]], and mocked them for their failure.
